knownLimitations: Wave 1.5 hardened AE bulletin provenance and confirmed that the verified 2019 UI does not expose AE major-document slots for 2019.
AE graduation-rule interpretation is still not normalized, so AE remains common-only despite cleaner source provenance.
ERP remains supporting catalog evidence only, and fall 2025 still returns spring rows in the captured UI.
